hooks.command: command -v code-review-graph >/dev/null 2>&1 && git -C "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}" rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && code-review-graph update --skip-flows --repo "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true

D="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}"; C="$D/CLAUDE.md"; B="$D/.claude-md.bak"; if grep -q 'claude-modules:managed' "$C" 2>/dev/null; then cp "$C" "$B"; elif [ -f "$B" ]; then cp "$B" "$C" && echo 'CLAUDE.md restored from backup (overwrite detected)'; fi; true

command -v code-review-graph >/dev/null 2>&1 && git -C "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}" rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && code-review-graph update --repo "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}" >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'code-review-graph: graph ready for this session' || echo 'code-review-graph: skipped (tool not installed or not a git repo)'
